title: Build a Hermes Knowledge Base That Self-Improves
summary: Build a self-improving knowledge base for Hermes AI agent using an Obsidian wiki connected to Claude and NotebookLM, with automatic ingestion of meetings, emails, and research via Granola and cron jobs. The approach applies Andrej Karpathy's LLM wiki principles to give AI agents persistent, growing memory across documents.
writeup: The video walks through building a self-improving knowledge base for the Hermes AI agent, using an Obsidian wiki connected to Claude and NotebookLM. Ingestion is automated: meetings, emails, and research flow in via Granola and cron jobs, so the wiki grows without manual upkeep. The setup applies Andrej Karpathy's LLM wiki principles to give AI agents persistent memory that expands across documents over time.
